mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT tcp.post_no, tcp.user_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname, tcp.post_date, (SELECT COUNT(post_like_no) FROM tbl_post_like tpl WHERE tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no) AS like_count FROM tbl_community_post tcp
tcp.post_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
tcp.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
tcp.post_date LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY tcp.post_date DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT tcp.post_no,tcp.user_no, tcp.post_title, tcp.user_nickname, tcp.post_date, tcp.post_content, tcp.post_view_count, (select count(post_like_no) from tbl_post_like tpl where tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no) as like_count, tpi.Post_Img_System_Name, tpi.Post_Img_Origin_Name FROM tbl_community_post tcp LEFT JOIN tbl_post_image tpi on tpi.post_no = tcp.post_no where tcp.post_no = #{postNo}
